name: Web Browse
description: Search the web and read any web page. Lets Gumm look up current information, read articles, and research any topic online. Uses DuckDuckGo (no API key required).
examples: Search for the latest AI news
What is the current price of Bitcoin?
What happened in the news today?

commands.name: search
commands.shortDescription: Search the web for any topic
commands.description: Use the text provided after /search as the search query. Use the web_search tool to find relevant results, then summarize the top 4-5 results with titles, snippets, and source URLs. If the query includes a URL (starts with http/https), use web_read to read that page and summarize its content instead.

commands.name: read
commands.shortDescription: Read and summarize a web page
commands.description: Use the URL provided after /read as the target page. Use the web_read tool to fetch and parse the page content. Provide a clear and concise summary of the main content: key points, important data, and any notable facts. If no URL is provided, ask the user for one.
